subject: [PATCH v6 03/10] mm/memory_hotplug: pass online_type to online_memory_block() via arg

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `online_memory_block` function to accept the online type through an argument, rather than calling a default value internally. This change prepares for future patches that will allow callers to specify explicit online types. The patch also updates the `add_memory_resource` function to pass the default online type via a local variable. There is no functional change in this patch.
